task_completion.description: Verify the default 'Amateur' module has been removed from the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Amateur' tab or window is no longer visible anywhere in the main application workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Miami_NHC' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Miami_NHC' appears in the ground station configuration list, or is listed as the active ground station in the module headers/settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Global_Wx' module is configured with a Map-only layout and tracks the required NOAA satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab or window named 'Global_Wx' is visible, displaying ONLY a map view. The map should show the satellites NOAA 15, NOAA 18, and NOAA 19.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Radar_Wx' module is configured with a Polar-only layout and tracks the required NOAA satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab or window named 'Radar_Wx' is visible, displaying ONLY a polar plot (radar-like circular view). The plot should show the satellites NOAA 15, NOAA 18, and NOAA 19.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Schedule_Wx' module is configured with a List-only layout and tracks the required NOAA satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab or window named 'Schedule_Wx' is visible, displaying ONLY a text list or schedule view of upcoming passes for NOAA 15, NOAA 18, and NOAA 19.

task_completion.description: Verify the global preferences are updated to show 2 orbits for the Map Ground Track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The preferences dialog shows '2' for ground track orbits, OR the map view in the 'Global_Wx' module clearly displays exactly 2 orbit lines (ground tracks) for the satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify the global time format is set to UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time displayed in the application's status bar, clock, or schedule list explicitly indicates 'UTC' instead of a local time zone.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to configure the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual satellite tracking GUI application open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely navigated the configuration menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show dialog boxes for module configuration, preferences, or ground station setup being actively used.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not spoofed by pasting text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final dashboard is a genuine workspace with rendered maps, polar plots, and lists, not a mock-up or a text file containing the expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Miami_NHC Ground Station Coordinates: Latitude ~25.754 N, Longitude ~80.38 W (or -80.38), Altitude ~2-3m. Required Satellites: NOAA 15 (NORAD ID 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD ID 28654), and NOAA 19 (NORAD ID 33591).
